name: Amhari- Atklit, Tigre - Alz'e (Ethiopian Vegetable Bowl)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is common to the Ethiopian Jews (Falashas). My understanding is that these are NOT unique to them.
Peel all vegetables and cut into small cubes. Peel and mash the garlic.
Heat oil in a large pan and add vegetables. Cover and sauté 2-3 minutes.
Add ginger, turmeric, pepper, and salt; mix well.
Add water, stir, and cook over very low flame for 30-40 minutes.
Serve hot.
